creator: mike@fth-devel.net
text:
While libtecla works as expected the accompanying enhance command
cannot find a free pseudo-terminal because the libtecla configure
script doesn't detect system-V pseudo-terminal allocation on recent
FreeBSD versions.  The developer has released a new version which
solved this issue.

Because ports/devel/libtecla has no maintainer, I would take it.

Fix: The developer has released a new version with a working enhance
command for newer FreeBSD versions.
How-To-Repeat: In the example below 'ficl' is the Forth interpreter from ports/lang/ficl
but it can be any interpreter.

% enhance ficl
enhance: Unable to find a free pseudo-terminal.
